title: Spicanta occidentalis
intro:
There is no information about the plant "Spicanta occidentalis". However, there is a plant called "Spilanthes occidentalis" which is a flowering plant belonging to the family Asteraceae.

Here is a paragraph about Spilanthes occidentalis:

Spilanthes occidentalis is a flowering plant that is traditionally used as a medicinal herb. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help to soothe mouth sores, reduce fever, and protect against infections. The bioactive constituents of Spilanthes occidentalis include spilanthol, a sesquiterpene that has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activity, as well as other flavonoids and phenolic compounds. In traditional herbal medicine, Spilanthes occidentalis is commonly prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusion, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, including oral infections and digestive issues.
